creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
2009/6/23  <timur@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] net/samba3: update to 3.3.5
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open
> State-Changed-By: timur
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jun 23 13:39:02 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why:
> Ok, can you explain, what is the reason behind:
>
> -PORTVERSION?=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A03.3.4 -PORTREVISION?=
=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 0 -CATEGORIES?=3D
> net +PORTVERSION=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 3.3.5 +PORTREVISIO=
N=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A01 +CATEGORIES=3D
> net
>
> -MAINTAINER?=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 timur@FreeBSD.org +MAI=
NTAINER=3D
> timur@FreeBSD.org
>
> Replacing ?=3D with the =3D sign and bumping PORTREVISION for the new
> version of the port?

replaces =3D? =3D concerned by the "portlint-ca" suggest that replacement
Change the PORTREVISION since this is a change in Makefile


> =C2=A0# Disable for now on
> -.undef WITH_SHARED_LIBS
>
> =C2=A0.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
>
> +.undef WITH_SHARED_LIBS +
>
> Moving .undef around?

the "portlint-ca" suggest that replacement


> =C2=A0.if !defined(WITHOUT_WINBIND) MAN1+=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =
wbinfo.1
> -MAN7+=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 pam_winbind.7 winbind_krb5_locator.=
7 +MAN7+=3D
> winbind_krb5_locator.7
> =C2=A0MAN8+=3D =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 =C2=A0 winbindd.8 .endif
>
> You removing pam_winbind.7 here, but what it is replaced with? The
> correct answer is with pam_winbind.8, but I don't see that in your
> patch.

Excuse me for not including the pam_winbind.8, my tinderbox not show
this file, therefore not included.

> That's the explanations I was asking about.
>
> With regards, Timur.
